description: Rise of Avalon Patch 9 - Hotfix 1 (26 November 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes
sections.description: Note: this is a server-side Hotfix and does not require updating the game client.
items: Damage from the Spectre Jacket spell: Self Ignition no longer stacks from multiple players. However when multiple players use the spell within overlapping damage areas, no damage is dealt. This is a known issue and will be resolved in an upcoming patch.
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Spectre Jacket Self Ignition stacking multiple players overlapping damage known issue server-side hotfix no client update
